headline: UnitedHealth: Why It's Still Not Too Late To Buy The Turnaround
summary: UnitedHealth (UNH) outlook: 2026 reset amid regulatory pressure; Medicare Advantage scale & value-based care could lift margins. Read more macro analysis here.
